ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* GEOID of the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the region */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., Total Population, White, Black or African American) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the dataset belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "tot_pop" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "white_pop" INTEGER /* White population of the region */,
  "black_pop" INTEGER /* Black or African American population of the region */,
  "hispanic_pop" INTEGER /* Hispanic or Latino population of the region */,
  "other_pop" INTEGER /* Other population of the region */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Procedure of the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sources" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_methodologies" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_age_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting age population record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "tot_vap" INTEGER /* Total voting age population of the region */,
  "white_vap" INTEGER /* White voting age population of the region */,
  "black_vap" INTEGER /* Black or African American voting age population of the region */,
  "hispanic_vap" INTEGER /* Hispanic or Latino voting age population of the region */,
  "other_vap" INTEGER /* Other voting age population of the region */,
  "citizen_vap" INTEGER /* Citizen voting age population of the region */,
  "non_citizen_vap" INTEGER /* Non-citizen voting age population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_age_population_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the race category (e.g., White, Black or African American, Hispanic or Latino) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_race_categories" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race category */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
